fixes.message: fix: allow unsafe-inline scripts for PrimeNG, fix empty state icon z-index
fix: match html background color, wrap long docker command
fix: use single background color with gradient overlays to avoid banding
fix: match landing page background to app (noise texture + gradients)
fix: improve landing page accessibility (focus states, contrast)
fix: exempt only status/login/logout from auth middleware
fix: address PR review feedback
fix(dashboard): use compound projection engine for goal timeline
fix(ux): enable count-up animation on initial currency display load
fix(projections): remove duplicate padding/max-width that caused inconsistent margins
fix(ux): replace Angular route animation with CSS-only page fade
fix(ux): remove translateY from route animation to prevent content jump
fix(cashflow): improve readability of expense category subheadings
fix(snapshots): make entity type filter reactive so switching to liabilities updates the list
fix(cashflow): add consistent total rows to income, expenses, and savings tables
fix(cashflow): add bottom margin to income vs expense chart to prevent label overlap
fix(cashflow): append select dropdowns to body so they overflow dialog bounds
fix(cashflow): clean up debug logging and startup workaround
fix(cashflow): re-seed expense categories on startup to fix SQLite GUID case mismatch
fix(cashflow): show full error body in toast for debugging
fix(cashflow): add error handling to income/expense create to surface validation errors
fix(cashflow): use PascalCase income type values to match backend validation
fix(cashflow): add expense category grouping with subtotals
fix: constrain simulations and inflation input widths to prevent overflow
fix: group simulations and inflation controls to prevent overlap
fix: match projections section layout to existing form-grid style in edit dialogs
fix: use CurrencyPipe for contribution display on assets table
fix: correct scope options, horizon presets, entity filtering, and missing date pickers
fix(app): increase spacing below goal progress bar
fix(app): fix record value dialog and dashboard period=undefined
fix(app): remove old Angular favicon
fix(app): use small rounded icon button for dark mode toggle
fix(app): use semantic PrimeNG tokens for dark mode support
